title: sutera micrantha
intro: Sutera micrantha, also known as the hairy sutera, is a flowering plant species in the genus Sutera, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Sutera micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sutera micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
